_patch_meta.description: Stage 1 remediation for Registry 103 (love). Three mti_terms corrections: G7493 (eraō) confirmed delete — no STEP verse coverage; H2245 (chavav) exclusion_reason corrected — deletion confirmed; H2898 (tuv) reinstated to extracted — verse-level inspection confirmed inner-being content across 14 of 31 verses. Root family gap corrections (7 terms) and H2898 inventory reinstatement are in the accompanying CC directive (PATCH-20260412-103-PREANALYSIS-V1-CCDIRECTIVE.md). H2898 Verse Context sub-process required after CC directive is applied.

set.exclusion_reason: eraō to love passionately — no STEP verse coverage in this registry. Classical Greek erotic love vocabulary; absent from NT/LXX in STEP extraction.

operations.description: G7493 (eraō) — confirmed delete. Extracted status was incorrect: 0 verses, absent from strongs_list, no STEP coverage. Researcher confirmed.

set.exclusion_reason: chavav to love fervently — single verse (Deu 33:3, God as subject). Adequately covered by H0160 (ahavah) which covers divine love with larger corpus. Deletion confirmed.

operations.description: H2245 (chavav) — deletion confirmed; exclusion_reason corrected. Prior exclusion_reason text contradicted delete status. Single-verse, adequacy-of-coverage deletion is appropriate.

H2898 (tuv, goodness) — reinstated from delete to extracted. Verse-level inspection of 31 verses identified 14 with inner-being content (divine goodness as character attribute and object of inner orientation/satisfaction) and 17 as material goods/property (set aside). Deletion was undocumented and analytically unjustified. Owner_type and inventory reinstatement handled in CC directive.

Root family gap corrections (G5370, G5373, G5384, G2705, G5382 missing FILOS; H0157H missing AHAV; H1730G missing DOD) require wa_term_root_family inserts — handled in CC directive. H2898 inventory reinstatement (restore_delete_flagged, owner_type update, strongs_list addition for G7493) also in CC directive. H2898 Verse Context sub-process required after CC directive confirmed.
